title: Apple is reportedly testing a MacBook Neo with more RAM
summary: Following a similar report from analyst Tim Culpan earlier this year, Bloomberg ’s Mark Gurman says the new Neo will run on an A19 Pro processor, which currently powers the iPhone 17 Pro / Pro Max and the iPhone Air, unlike the…
